revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月廿一]][[zh:八月廿一]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 21|qq=August 21}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 21''' is the 21st day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|qid=Q18520676|lt=Hōki|1=Hōki}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|770|en|770|qid=Q25021|lt=770|1=770}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}} ) – Following the passing of {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|qid=Q232955|lt=Shōtoku|1=Empress Kōken}} , the deposed {{ill|Dōkyō|en|Dōkyō|qid=Q1272718|lt=Dōkyō|1=Dōkyō}} was exiled to {{ill|Shimotsuke Province|ja|Shimotsuke Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimotsuke Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and appointed as {{ill|Yakushiji Betsutō|ja|薬師寺別当|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushiji Betsutō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Hōen|en|Hōen|qid=Q1193929|lt=Hōen|1=Hōen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1135|en|1135|qid=Q19594|lt=1135|1=1135}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|qid=Q2881|lt=September 30|1=September 30}} ) – Due to the meritorious achievement in suppressing pirates by {{ill|Taira no Tadamori|en|Taira no Tadamori|qid=Q3083805|lt=Taira no Tadamori|1=Taira no Tadamori}} , his son [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |Taira no Kiyomori|lt=Taira no Kiyomori|lt_ja=清盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was conferred the Rank of {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|ja|従四位下|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}} . * {{ill|Entoku|ja|Entoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1489|en|1489|qid=Q6665|lt=1489|1=1489}} {{ill|September 16|en|September 16|qid=Q2897|lt=September 16|1=September 16}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Chōkyō|en|Chōkyō|qid=Q968843|lt=Chōkyō|1=Chōkyō}} to {{ill|Entoku|ja|Entoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} via an {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} . * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|ja|1611|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1611|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503384|1=1611}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|qid=Q2884|lt=September 27|1=September 27}} ) – In the {{ill|Aizu|en|Aizu|qid=Q1205071|lt=Aizu|1=Aizu}} region, the {{ill|Aizu Earthquake|ja|会津Earthquake|lt=Aizu Earthquake|lt_ja=大Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} occurred, and the {{ill|Agagawa River|ja|阿賀川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agagawa River|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 阿賀野川|1=Agano River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q390458}} was temporarily dammed. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}} ) – {{ill|Namamugi Incident|en|Namamugi Incident|qid=Q546075|lt=Namamugi Incident|1=Namamugi Incident}} . * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|qid=Q2882|lt=September 29|1=September 29}} ) – The {{ill|Imperial Court|ja|朝廷 (日本)|lt=Imperial Court|lt_ja=朝廷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Court|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Imperial Court of Japan|qid=Q30253177}} , in connection with the death of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|qid=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemochi|1=Tokugawa Iemochi}} , issued an {{ill|imperial command|ja|勅命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/imperial command|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 勅|1=Command paper|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q905765}} canceling the {{ill|Chōshū Expedition|ja|長州征討|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōshū Expedition|1=Chōshū Expeditions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q113587768}} . {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|qid=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} sent Iemochi's remains by warship to {{ill|Edo|en|Edo|qid=Q215646|lt=Edo|1=Edo}} . == Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1729|en|1729|qid=Q6952|lt=1729|1=1729}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}} ) – {{ill|Ono Ranzan|en|Ono Ranzan|qid=Q11464264|lt=Ono Lansan|1=Ono Ranzan}} , a scholar of {{ill|Herbal medicine|en|Herbal medicine|qid=Q861699|lt=Materia Medica|1=Herbal medicine}} (d. {{ill|1810|en|1810|qid=Q6922|lt=1810|1=1810}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1830|en|1830|qid=Q7576|lt=1830|1=1830}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|qid=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}} ) – {{ill|Harada Ichidō|ja|原田一道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Harada Ichidō|1=Harada Ichidō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11409750}} , a soldier (d. {{ill|1910|en|1910|qid=Q2075|lt=1910|1=1910}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|September 20|en|September 20|qid=Q2892|lt=September 20|1=September 20}} ) – {{ill|Joseph Heco|en|Joseph Heco|qid=Q753228|lt=Hamada Hikozō|1=Joseph Heco}} , an interpreter and trader (d. {{ill|1897|en|1897|qid=Q7847|lt=1897|1=1897}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1264|en|1264|qid=Q5514|lt=1264|1=1264}} {{ill|September 12|en|September 12|qid=Q2849|lt=September 12|1=September 12}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Nagatoki|en|Hōjō Nagatoki|qid=Q2906574|lt=Hōjō Nagatoki|1=Hōjō Nagatoki}} , the 6th {{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|qid=Q1045904|lt=Shikken|1=Shikken}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (b. {{ill|1230|en|1230|qid=Q5412|lt=1230|1=1230}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|20|8|22|7|21|9|8|0821|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月廿一]] {{translated page|ja|8月21日 (旧暦)|version=97910014|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:8 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:August 21 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 8월 21일]] [[ja:8月21日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月廿一]]
[[ja:歴史年表]] [[ar:August 21 (Lunisolar)]]
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月廿一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月廿一]] {{wikidata link|Q840225}} [[Category:Days]] [[Category:旧暦8月]]
